title: Tameable Rabbits
body:
Show rabbits in Minecraft some love!

Now you can tame them with hay bales (configurable). They follow you around and can be sat down like any other pet, then they will flop into an adorable little puddle.

![2 adult and 1 baby rabbit flopping on their side in the corner of a pink Minecraft house](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5f2dc529ddd438ccebbcb0f320d634340b347b7.png)

Currently no other custom behaviour is implemented, attacks for killer bunnies will be implemented in the future.

The tame chance can also be configured.
